title: So Slime SSC 122U Giant bucket 1KG, 250g, Random
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: GIANT SLIME KIT BUCKET – Explore endless fun with the So Slime Giant Bucket! This 1 kg XXL kit lets kids mix, stretch, and twist vibrant slimes for a unique sensory experience. Watch colors blend and textures evolve for hours of creative playtime.

CREATE SLIMES WITH VARIED TEXTURES – Includes 4 x 250 g slime portions to mix and match for marbled, gradient, or layered effects. Each texture feels soft, stretchy, and satisfying, offering a mesmerizing sensory experience that sparks creativity.

FUN & CREATIVE ACTIVITY – Encourages fine motor skills, creativity, and relaxation through hands-on play. Ideal for creative workshops, birthday parties, or family activities where kids can explore, share, and express themselves freely. Perfect toy for sensory play !

COMPLETE KIT WITH ACCESSORIES – Comes with 1 kg of non-toxic, ready-to-use slime in 4 bright colors, plus a resealable bucket to preserve freshness. Easy to handle, safe for kids, and perfect for clean, creative, and worry-free sensory play.

CREATIVE GIFT IDEA – Designed in France and compliant with EU standards, this colorful slime set offers endless imaginative fun. The perfect original gift for birthdays, holidays, or family playtime, combining entertainment, learning, and creativity.
